title: Lanterns-Lamps-Posts and lights
description: a mod with anything that has to do with lighting up a place
body:
lights.

![the](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a8040378bdb51b084d5a7fa3bf13c485ba741fe.png)

this mod just exists for the point of adding more lamps and poles to the game.

All models and textured have been made by myself

the lamps in pre-alpha versions (before the mod was on modrinth) used to glitch out a bit because of a bug wit trying to code the lamps to turn on when you right-clicked on them

most bugs have been fixed so far
althogh the mod is a bit useless other than for decoration

But this mod took a while to figure out and it was somewhat worth it so.

This mod adds (as of v0.1.2):


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

copper bulb off, copper bulb on, small copper bulb off, small copper bulb on, Large copper bulb off, Large copper bulb on, steel pole, steel trestle pole, copper trestle pole, steel pole with arm, oil lantern off, oil lantern open, oil lantern on, red led off, red led on, green led off, green led on, blue led off, blue led on, white led off, white led on, red signal, green signal


Soon to come:

semaphore signal up, semaphore signal down, level crossing signal off, level crossing signal on.


</details>
